focus: Top 5 Campti-native improvements for Chapter 1 and author cockpit.

recommendedImprovements.title: Add salience-budget gates to consciousness routing
recommendedImprovements.expectedBenefitToChapterOrCockpit: Chapter 1 characters process fewer but more plausible cues, improving perspective realism.
recommendedImprovements.betterThanImportingSimulator: Reuses existing Campti cognition contracts and avoids external state machine coupling risk.

recommendedImprovements.title: Introduce perceived-vs-global state split in character console
recommendedImprovements.expectedBenefitToChapterOrCockpit: Improves misreading diagnostics and author ability to tune tension in Chapter 1 revisions.
recommendedImprovements.betterThanImportingSimulator: Extends current console semantics directly instead of adding parallel simulator entities and migration debt.

recommendedImprovements.title: Persist cognition deltas through regeneration loop
sourceIdeas: Perceive -> Appraise -> Emotion -> Intention -> Action -> Update Memory/State
recommendedImprovements.expectedBenefitToChapterOrCockpit: Reduces continuity drift between Chapter 1 regeneration passes and stabilizes emotional carry-over.
recommendedImprovements.betterThanImportingSimulator: Leverages existing regeneration checkpoints and chronology guards already native to Campti.

recommendedImprovements.title: Add social feedback pressure previews in decision panel
recommendedImprovements.expectedBenefitToChapterOrCockpit: Authors can preview downstream relationship pressure impacts before committing branch decisions.
recommendedImprovements.betterThanImportingSimulator: Keeps governance in one Campti decision surface rather than syncing two divergent decision systems.

recommendedImprovements.title: Add cockpit-only deterministic/probabilistic simulation toggles
recommendedImprovements.expectedBenefitToChapterOrCockpit: Improves test reproducibility and exploratory what-if runs without leaking theory framing into runtime prose.
recommendedImprovements.betterThanImportingSimulator: Provides experimental flexibility while preserving Campti renderer contracts and canon safety barriers.
